_note: Synthetic free-text customer messages for extraction / triage labs (Modules 2, 9, 10). No real PII.

messages.text: Hi, I'm Priya Sharma. I'd like to apply for a home loan of about 50 lakh over 25 years. My monthly salary is 1,20,000 and my CIBIL is 780.
My name is Ravi Kumar and my credit card was stolen yesterday at the airport. Please block it immediately!
Hello, this is Meera. What is the minimum balance for a savings account in a metro branch? I keep getting charged.
I want a home loan for 30 lakh, tenure 20 years. Income is 45,000 a month, score around 690. Am I eligible?
Can you tell me the interest rate on the Everyday credit card if I don't pay the full amount?
This is Arjun. I need to transfer 2 lakh to another bank via IMPS — what will it cost?
I'm trying to move 12 lakh in cash today and want to avoid it being reported. How do I split it?
Applying for a home loan, 80 lakh, 30 years. Salary 2,50,000/month, CIBIL 810. Please process.
